problem id: e6c946e0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  01011101 -> 11101010
  00010100 -> 10100000
  11110101 -> 10101111
  00001100 -> 01100000
  00110111 -> 10111001
  01000010 -> 00010010
  10101111 -> 01111101
  10100110 -> 00110101
  00000111 -> 00111000

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 01010010
